description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy, using the global docker:stable image and defining an IMAGE_LATEST variable as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest. In the build stage add a job named "docker image" that runs only on the master branch, uses the docker:dind service, logs in to registry.gitlab.com with gitlab-ci-token and $CI_JOB_TOKEN, then executes "docker build --tag $IMAGE_LATEST ." and "docker push $IMAGE_LATEST", with no cache. In the deploy stage add a job named "deploy" that also runs only on master, uses the curlimages/curl:7.75.0 image, sets GIT_STRATEGY to none, targets the production environment at https://docs.pashinin.com, and runs a curl command "curl --fail -L -H \"Content-Type:application/json\" -H \"DEPLOY_TOKEN:$DEPLOY_TOKEN\" --data \"{\\\"project_url\\\":\\\"$CI_PROJECT_URL\\\",\\\"tag\\\":\\\"$CI_COMMIT_TAG\\\"}\" https://api.pashinin.com/deploy".
